Root_Cause: Lube oil filter fouling causing oil flow starvation, leading to friction elevation at NDE bearings
Contributing_Factors: Duplex lube oil filter differential pressure high alarm not actioned; overdue filter changeout
Corrective_Action: Replaced lube oil filter elements, flushed oil system, and confirmed NDE bearing temperature returned to normal
Recommendation: Add differential-pressure trip on lube oil filter and shorten filter changeout interval
Standard_Reference: API 617 lubrication guidance (referenced by number only)

Root_Cause: Grease contamination causing accelerated bearing wear
Contributing_Factors: Incorrect grease type applied at last service and process dust ingress at bearing housing
Corrective_Action: Replaced DE bearing 6309-2RS and repacked with approved grease Mobilux EP2
Recommendation: Enforce single approved grease and fit bearing isolator seals
Standard_Reference: OISD-137 vibration monitoring (referenced by number only)

Root_Cause: Coupling misalignment beyond 0.05 mm TIR following mechanical seal replacement
Contributing_Factors: Alignment not re-verified after maintenance work order closeout
Corrective_Action: Realigned coupling to within 0.05 mm TIR and replaced drive-end bearing
Recommendation: Make post-maintenance laser alignment a mandatory closeout check
